$comment: Behavior contract capture config for the implement-validation-via-fluentvalidator refactor. Track=backend. The frozen surface is: every gRPC handler's input/output proto, plus the externally observable error surface (RpcException StatusCode + Detail message) for each validator-driven failure path. After the refactor those StatusCode + Detail strings MUST be byte-identical (or fall within tolerance). All surfaces use exact tolerance — text/proto diffs are auto-fail.

surfaces.command: cd OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Protos && for f in $(find . -name '*.proto' -type f | LC_ALL=C sort); do printf '=== %s ===\n' "$f"; cat "$f"; printf '\n'; done
cd OneMoreTaskTracker.Tasks/Protos && for f in $(find . -name '*.proto' -type f -not -path './Clients/*' | LC_ALL=C sort); do printf '=== %s ===\n' "$f"; cat "$f"; printf '\n'; done
cd OneMoreTaskTracker.Users/Protos && for f in $(find . -name '*.proto' -type f | LC_ALL=C sort); do printf '=== %s ===\n' "$f"; cat "$f"; printf '\n'; done
grep -REn 'throw new RpcException\(new Status\(StatusCode\.[A-Za-z]+,' OneMoreTaskTracker.Users --include='*.cs' | grep -v '/bin/' | grep -v '/obj/' | LC_ALL=C sort
grep -REn 'throw new RpcException\(new Status\(StatusCode\.[A-Za-z]+,' OneMoreTaskTracker.Tasks --include='*.cs' | grep -v '/bin/' | grep -v '/obj/' | LC_ALL=C sort
grep -REn 'throw new RpcException\(new Status\(StatusCode\.[A-Za-z]+,' OneMoreTaskTracker.Features --include='*.cs' | grep -v '/bin/' | grep -v '/obj/' | LC_ALL=C sort
ls OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Migrations | LC_ALL=C sort | grep -E '^[0-9]+_.+\.cs$' | grep -v Designer
ls OneMoreTaskTracker.Tasks/Migrations | LC_ALL=C sort | grep -E '^[0-9]+_.+\.cs$' | grep -v Designer
ls OneMoreTaskTracker.Users/Migrations | LC_ALL=C sort | grep -E '^[0-9]+_.+\.cs$' | grep -v Designer
grep -REn 'StatusCode\s*==\s*StatusCode\.|StatusCode\.Should\(\)|\.Status\.Detail|RpcException' tests --include='*.cs' | grep -v '/bin/' | grep -v '/obj/' | LC_ALL=C sort
